title: Design System: CETIEM — Plataforma de Certificación ESG

institutional-jade.note: Moodboard canonical. Codebase currently uses #00D47A — migrate to this value.

compliance-lime.note: Admin-role marker. Never used as a success state — that is status-approved.

assessment-cyan.note: Assessor-role marker. Not used on Empresa-facing screens.

status-progress.note: V.L.A.P. quad: active AI processing, pipeline running.

status-review.note: V.L.A.P. quad: awaiting human validation by assessor.

status-hardstop.note: V.L.A.P. quad: non-compliance detected, triggers CAPA workflow.

neutral-mid.note: From moodboard. Timestamps, metadata, neutral indicators.

display.purpose: Landing page hero and major section anchors. Bricolage Grotesque only.

headline.purpose: Section titles within the product. First heading the assessor sees per screen.

title.purpose: Panel headings, card titles, sidebar section labels.

body.purpose: All reading content. 65ch max line length.

label.purpose: Badges, nav labels, breadcrumbs, status tags, table column headers. Always uppercase + tracking 0.2em.

mono.purpose: Certificate hashes, document UUIDs, audit log entries.

shadows.name: glow-green
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover. The system's one moment of theatrics. Never on static surfaces.

shadows.name: glow-green-sm
shadows.purpose: Input focus supplement, active nav item glow.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Input focus state. Structural, not decorative.

shadows.name: ambient-dark
shadows.purpose: Floating panels (notification drawer). Reinforces elevation above the surface stack.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. Snappy out, never bouncy.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Color and opacity transitions (hover states, badge changes).

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Transform transitions (button lift, nav slide, card expand).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary certification action. Used for Solicitar Certificación, Iniciar Registro, Emitir Dictamen. Lifts and glows on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; background: #1d9e75; color: #0A0A0A; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 0 28px rgba(29,158,117,0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1d9e75; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: none; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary navigation CTA. Used for Acceso al Sistema, secondary form actions. Arrow animates on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost">Acceso al Sistema <svg class="ds-btn-ghost__arrow" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.50); font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.80); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover .ds-btn-ghost__arrow { transform: translateX(2px); } .ds-btn-ghost__arrow { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Hard Stop actions only: revoke certificate, reject assessment. Requires confirmation step before execution.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; background: #aa3939; color: #F2F2F2; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #aa3939; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-destructive:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Status Badge — Approved
components.description: V.L.A.P. certification complete. Olive-lime — serious, not celebratory. Always paired with label text.
components.html: APROBADO
components.css: .ds-status-approved { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; background: rgba(159,192,49,0.12); color: #9fc031; border: 1px solid rgba(159,192,49,0.30); border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Status Badge — Hard Stop
components.description: Non-compliance. Hard stop threshold breached (<85% V.L.A.P. score). Triggers CAPA workflow automatically.
components.html: HARD STOP
components.css: .ds-status-hardstop { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; background: rgba(170,57,57,0.12); color: #aa3939; border: 1px solid rgba(170,57,57,0.30); border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Base content container. Flat at rest. 12px radius. 1px subtle border. Used for document panels, data sections, form groups.
components.html:
Dictamen V.L.A.P.

Análisis preliminar de cumplimiento ESG generado por Kimi K2.6.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #111111; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #F2F2F2; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0 0 8px 0; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #999999; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input. Jade focus ring. Used for search, form fields, document filters.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.60); } .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 10px 16px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #F2F2F2; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.30); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #1d9e75; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(29,158,117,0.12); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item. Active state uses jade accent + 2px left border (structural state signal, not decorative stripe).
components.html: Panel de Control
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 2px solid transparent; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.015em; transition: color 150ms ease-out, background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.80); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: rgba(29,158,117,0.08); color: #1d9e75; border-left-color: #1d9e75; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; color: inherit; }

components.name: AI Hint Panel
components.description: Persistent sidebar tile. Shows the AI protocol context for the current role. Never interactive.
components.html:
Filtro Cero IA

Procesamiento de documentos asistido por IA · Filtro Cero V.L.A.P.
components.css: .ds-ai-hint { background: rgba(29,158,117,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(29,158,117,0.12); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; } .ds-ai-hint__header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-ai-hint__label { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.5625rem; font-weight: 900; color: #1d9e75; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3em; } .ds-ai-hint__body { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
CETIEM is not a SaaS dashboard. It is the place where Mexico's ESG compliance record is created, validated, and sealed. Every visual decision answers one question: would this document hold up in court? The aesthetic is that of a notarial chamber running on AI: absolute black surfaces like polished carbon, a deep institutional jade that reads as a compliance seal, and UI density calibrated strictly to role.

The system explicitly rejects three failure modes: generic SaaS green (warm, rounded, disposable), Mexican government portal aesthetics (gray, formless, no hierarchy), and crypto dark-mode (neon excess, speculative energy). When the certification is issued, it must feel final, verifiable, and serious.
keyCharacteristics: Always-dark surfaces: authority is not negotiated per-screen
Institutional Jade (#1d9e75) as the single canonical primary: rare, earned by proximity to certification events
Tonal layering (#0A → #0D → #11 → #16) creates depth without shadows or decoration
The V.L.A.P. status quad is the system's primary communication mechanism
Typographic hierarchy through weight + scale contrast; no gradient text, no ornament

rules.name: The One Pair Rule
rules.body: Every V.L.A.P. status color always travels with its label or icon. Color alone is never sufficient for state communication.

rules.name: The Glow Exception Rule
rules.body: The only decorative light effect permitted is the green glow on activated interactive elements. Every other bloom or radial gradient on a UI element is prohibited.

rules.name: The Triple-Layer Rule
rules.body: Every badge carries all three: background tint + solid text color + opacity border. A badge with only one or two layers is incomplete.

rules.name: The No-Decoration Rule
rules.body: No text-shadow on any label or body copy. No background-clip: text gradient text. Emphasis through weight and scale, never through color on multi-line text.

rules.name: The Label Reserve Rule
rules.body: The Inter Black + uppercase + wide-tracking combination belongs exclusively to the Label role. Do not use it on body text, descriptions, or headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Panels and cards are flat at rest. No resting card box-shadow. The surface color difference is the elevation system.

rules.name: The No-Nested-Card Rule
rules.body: Cards inside cards are always wrong. Use padding variation, dividers, or section-level background tints instead.

dos: Do use Institutional Jade (#1d9e75) as the canonical primary, not #00D47A.
Do pair every V.L.A.P. status color with its text label or icon.
Do use the tonal surface stack for elevation: #0A0A0A base → #0D0D0D sidebar → #111111 cards → #161616 floating.
Do write all UI labels, error messages, and notifications in Spanish (Mexico).
Do use uppercase Inter Black + tracking 0.2em exclusively for Badge/Label content.
Do use Bricolage Grotesque exclusively for Display and Headline roles.
Do use JetBrains Mono for certificate hashes, document UUIDs, and audit log entries.
Do cap body text at 65ch maximum line length.
Do keep the green glow strictly reserved for primary button activation.
Do vary padding across sections for rhythm.
donts: Don't use #00D47A as the brand primary. It reads as generic SaaS green.
Don't use generic SaaS green UI patterns: warm rounded cards, illustration-led empty states, soft pastel backgrounds.
Don't reference Mexican government portal aesthetics: gray form surfaces, table-heavy layouts, no visual rhythm.
Don't use crypto/Web3 neon-dark patterns: multiple simultaneous neon colors, neon-on-neon layering, aggressive bloom.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient text. Prohibited absolutely.
Don't add resting box-shadow card shadows. Elevation is tonal.
Don't use glassmorphism on content panels, data tables, or closely-read surfaces.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a decorative color stripe on cards or callouts.
Don't use V.L.A.P. status colors outside their defined semantic roles.
Don't add illustrations, mascots, or celebratory animations. The Certification Vault has no characters.
